title: Snapper Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry dish made with snapper and crunchy vegetables. Serve over a bed of rice for a filling meal.

ingredients.name: crunchy
ingredients.notes: peeled and chopped carrots, bell peppers

instructions: Heat the fry in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the snapper fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
Remove the snapper from the skillet and set aside.
Add the crunchy vegetables to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, until slightly tender.
Return the snapper to the skillet and stir in the pepperly.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the snapper is coated in the pepperly sauce.
Serve hot over a bed of rice.
Garnish with additional pepperly, if desired.
